welcome.content: 👋 Schools, please complete this questionnaire to provide a holistic overview of {student_name}, including their learning profile as well as their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language and sensory needs.

behaviour_free_time.question: What does the student usually do during free time/break time at school?

behaviour_remain_classroom.question: Does the student manage to remain in the classroom and participate appropriately throughout the entire school day?

options.label: Always – Manages the full school day in the classroom
Sometimes –but regularly requires support, breaks, or time outside the classroom.

behaviour_remain_classroom.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

options.label: Responds best when instructions are supported by visual cues
Responds best when given extra processing time before responding

cognitive_5.question: Does the student get distracted easily?

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will feed directly into {student_name}'s report.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
